title: DualHandGlow Plugin
description: A Minecraft plugin providing portable dynamic lighting and a real offhand item display using invisible Light Blocks and Armor Stands.
body:
---

> ### 💎 DualHandGlow
>
> **A simple, lightweight plugin that makes items in your main hand and off-hand glow!**
>
> ---
>
> ## ✨ Overview
>
> Ever wanted your favorite items to stand out? **DualHandGlow** is the perfect cosmetic plugin for your server!
>
> This plugin adds the "Glow" (Outlined) effect to any item a player is holding, affecting both their **Main Hand** and **Off-Hand** simultaneously. It's perfect for showing off rare items, as a cosmetic perk for donors, or simply adding a touch of style to your server.
>
> ## 🚀 Features
>
> * **Dual Hand Support:** Items in both the main hand and off-hand will glow.
> * **Lightweight:** Designed to be simple and have minimal impact on server performance (TPS).
> * **Permission Based:** Fully controllable via permissions. Grant the glow effect to specific players or groups.
> * **(Optional) Customizable:** (If applicable: Easily configure the glow color via the config.)
>
> ## 🎮 How to Use
>
> **[Example: Command-Based]**
>
> > Players can toggle their glow effect on or off using **`/ofh`**.
>
> ## 🔑 Permissions
>
> * `dualhandglow.use` - Allows players to use the **`/ofh`** toggle command.
> * `dualhandglow.mainhand` - Enables the glow effect for the main hand.
> * `dualhandglow.offhand` - Enables the glow effect for the off-hand.
> * `dualhandglow.admin` - Access to administrative commands (like **`/ofh reload`**, if you have one).
>
> ## 💬 Support & Suggestions
> **Got a problem, a bug, or a great idea?**

> Join our **[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/EjCrQ5PXYV)** for the fastest support, or report issues on 
>
